patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (DOB documented as 05/05/1952 in multiple records), has documented dyslipidemia and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Additional problem lists include essential hypertension, postoperative anemia, and leg pain. A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled for 02/21/2025 under Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Key laboratory abnormalities from 07/03/2023 include low Iron 41 (L), low Iron Saturation 15 (L), elevated Ferritin 266.8 (H), triglycerides 158 (H), VLDL 32 (H), anion gap 5.0 (L), and eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L). Recent BP recorded 128/78 on 01/11/2025. Multiple care team members are listed including Hand, Hoyet A, MD and Darlington, Andrew, DO. Several demographic and social-history items conflict across documents (DOB, legal sex, tobacco use).
